pageTitle: Anıl Sezgin — Senior AOSP & BSP Developer
name: Anıl Sezgin
title: Senior AOSP & BSP Developer
summary: Senior software engineer with 13+ years of experience in consumer electronics, defense industry, and automotive. Expert in Embedded Android (AOSP), Board Support Package (BSP) development, and QNX. Proven track record in leading platform-level software development across smartphones, tablets, defense systems, and next-generation automotive infotainment platforms.

items: Integration of baselines of various automotive Android and QNX projects.
Customization of Android Automotive OS and QNX for OEM customer needs.
Debugging platform-level issues on both QNX Hypervisor and Android VM.
Writing automated tests using Behave and Pytest frameworks.
Development and maintenance of software download applications using Android's Update Engine.
Adaptation of Android OTA package creation to customer-specific software download format.
Debugging platform-level issues on both QNX and Android Virtual Machine.
Extension and development of ExoPlayer library for real-time video streaming.
Development of video player applications using GStreamer SDK, H.264 over RTP/RTSP.
Embedded Linux development using Yocto for i.MX 8 based custom HMI boards.
Led architectural decisions for Android OS customization on Qualcomm-based smartphones and tablets.
Design, development and integration of system services for manufacturing and OTA updates.
Android OS bring-up on custom boards based on Qualcomm chipsets.
Peripheral bring-ups of display (MIPI-DSI), audio, sensors (I2C, SPI) on Linux Kernel.
BSP-level development and integration for tablet and smartphone product lines.
Android platform development and board bring-up for mobile devices.

education.coursework: Advanced OOP, Advanced Software Engineering, Agile Development, Android App Development, Multicore Programming, Software Testing & Analysis
Computer Architecture, Digital Electronics, Microprocessors, VLSI Design, System on Chip Design, Logic Design, C Programming

projects.name: Android Automotive Platform
projects.description: Integration and customization of Android Automotive OS and QNX Hypervisor for next-generation in-vehicle infotainment systems at HaleyTek AB.

projects.name: OTA Update System
projects.description: End-to-end software download solution using Android's Update Engine with customer-specific OTA package adaptation at Aptiv.

projects.name: Real-Time Video Streaming
projects.description: Extended ExoPlayer library for real-time video streaming. Built GStreamer-based video player with H.264 over RTP/RTSP at TÜBİTAK SAGE.

projects.name: HMI Embedded Linux Platform
projects.description: Built Embedded Linux using Yocto for i.MX 8 based custom boards powering Human-Machine Interaction Units in defense systems.

projects.name: Vestel Venus V3 5570
projects.description: Full BSP and AOSP development for Vestel's Venus smartphone line, including Qualcomm chipset bring-up and peripheral integration.

projects.name: THOR Tablet Series
projects.description: BSP and Android platform development for multiple THOR tablet variants and the 7.85" Tablet PC product line at Vestel Electronics.
